title: Draft Initial README Structure
description: Create the initial structure for the root README file, outlining all major sections as described in the PRD.
details: Draft a README.md at the root of the repository. Include placeholders for the following sections: Project Overview, Features, Tech Stack, Getting Started, Development Workflow, Authentication & AI Integration, Infrastructure (Terraform), Code Quality & Tooling, Troubleshooting & Known Issues, and Contribution Guidelines. Use markdown best practices for headings, lists, and code blocks.
test_strategy: Verify that README.md exists at the root and contains all required section headings and placeholder content. Check for correct markdown formatting.

title: Populate README with Setup and Usage Instructions
description: Fill in the README with detailed setup, installation, and usage instructions based on the PRD.
details: Expand the Getting Started and Development Workflow sections. Include step-by-step instructions for cloning the repo, installing dependencies, running the frontend and backend, and using Terraform scripts. Add code snippets for commands (e.g., npm install, npm run dev, terraform apply). Reference the monorepo structure and folder layout.
test_strategy: Follow the instructions from a clean environment to ensure they are accurate and complete. Validate that all commands work as described.

title: Document Authentication and AI Integration Modules
description: Add documentation for the authentication and AI integration modules in the README.
details: In the README, describe the purpose and usage of the auth.ts and ai.ts modules. Include examples of how to use the authentication middleware in new routes and how to extend the AI wrapper. Reference any required environment variables or API keys.
test_strategy: Check that the documentation accurately reflects the implementation and provides clear usage examples. Confirm that referenced files and variables exist.

title: Add Troubleshooting, Known Issues, and Contribution Guidelines
description: Complete the README by adding sections for troubleshooting, known issues, and contribution guidelines.
details: Summarize the known issues and mitigation guidelines from the PRD. Provide troubleshooting tips for common setup errors. Outline contribution steps, code formatting standards, and how to run linting/tests before submitting PRs.
test_strategy: Review for completeness and clarity. Ensure all known issues from the PRD are included and contribution steps are actionable.
